name: Midden-Groningen (Netherlands)
description: A purple field bearing the municipal logo — a stylised white 'M' — with the name 'gemeente Midden-Groningen' below it.
history: Flag of the municipality of Midden-Groningen in the province of Groningen, formed in 2018 from Hoogezand-Sappemeer, Menterwolde and Slochteren. The flag is the municipality's logo/wordmark banner rather than a heraldic design.

features.role: the municipal 'M' logo and wordmark 'gemeente Midden-Groningen'
